tone: opinionated coach talking to another coach — direct, specific, willing to disagree with conventional wisdom

brand.name: Gymtastic
brand.description: Written by gymnastics obsessives for gymnastics obsessives. Opinionated, specific, occasionally blunt about bad judging or overrated routines. Never encyclopaedic or neutral-toned. No filler phrases, no 'in the world of gymnastics', no summarising what was just said.
